programme.desc: Presentation of various forms of mass participation in events such as runs and marathons.The program will include interviews with participants.They will tell you what prompted them to take part in such a challenge.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
UEFA Conference League Magazine
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Football: UEFA Europa League - quarter-final match: SC Braga - Real Betis Balompie
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - FC Lausanne-Sport
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: RC Strasbourg - Crystal Palace FC

freeriding
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Panathinaikos AO - AS Roma
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Monte Carlo - 2nd round singles match
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: ATP World Tour Next Week
programme.desc: A program devoted to games from the main ATP Tour series.Fans will see, among others,announcements of upcoming tournaments.In addition, they will receive a portion of statistics and interesting facts, also from behind the scenes of the tennis world.

programme.title: Football: Dutch league - match: AFC Ajax Amsterdam - FC Twente
Football: Czech league - match: AC Sparta Prague - MFK Karviná
Football: Italian league - match: Inter Milan - AS Roma
Football: Scottish League - match: Dundee United FC - Celtic FC
Football: Dutch League - match: PSV Eindhoven - FC Utrecht
Football: German League - match: TSG 1899 Hoffenheim - 1. FSV Mainz 05
programme.desc: The Villagers team is not giving up in the fight for third place at the finish line of the season.However, her performance in the match against RB Leipzig just before the national team break did not confirm her high aspirations.Christian Ilzer's team lost 0-5, conceding four goals in the first half.Returning TSG Hoffenheim to winning ways in the next round of the Bundesliga will not be an easy task.FSV Mainz, who has been doing well in recent weeks and boasts a series of seven matches without defeat, will arrive at the PreZero Arena.

programme.title: Football: Dutch league - match: FC Volendam - Feyenoord Rotterdam
Football: German league - match: SC Freiburg - FC Bayern Munich
UEFA Conference League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - Djurgarden - 09.03.2023 - 1/8 finału - sezon 2022/2023 - 1 mecz

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.desc: The authors show the fascinating bond between people and horses.Traveling around the world, they present their point of view on horse riding and the community that builds it.They will also hold meetings with top players.

programme.desc: The program covers the PlusLiga, TAURON Liga and Champions League competitions.It will also include materials devoted to the Polish national team.

programme.desc: Polsat Sport journalists talk to their guests about football-related topics.The program will include, among others:interviews with football stars, polls and a review of recent events.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.desc: A reminder of the fights that aroused exceptional emotions in the boxing world.Viewers will once again see the clashes of the biggest stars of Polish and foreign boxing.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Boxing: Babilon Boxing Show in Chojnice - light heavyweight: Paweł Stępień - Szerzod Chusanow 20/09/2024
Combat sports: Dragon Fight Night 8 in Tłuszcz - fight: Artur Sowiński - Michał Kornacki 20/02/2026
Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.

programme.title: Combat sports: FEN 44 in Ostrów Wielkopolski - fight: Piotr Kuberski - Marcin Filipczak 28/01/2023
Boxing: Babilon Boxing Show in Radom - middleweight: Daniel Rutkowski - Damian Kiwior 17/12/2021
K.O.TV Weekly
programme.desc: The latest news from the boxing world.Boxing fans will find in this program, among others:results of the most important fights, announcements of galas and interesting facts related to this spectacular sport.

programme.title: Combat sports: Babilon MMA 46 in Międzyzdroje - fight: Marcin Sianos - Oli Thompson 09/08/2024

programme.desc: Viewers will learn about various sports shooting competitions.They will learn how to start training and learn the differences between individual weapons, including:a smoothbore shotgun and a ball rifle.

programme.desc: The program introduces viewers to the secrets of shooting.Types of weapons will be characterized and issues related to, among others, discussed:with hunting.Polish sports stars will be subjected to shooting tests.
